prompt: Show a radio group labelled 'Subscription plan' with options 'Free', 'Pro', and 'Enterprise', where the Pro option has help text 'Unlimited projects and priority support.' below it.
reference:
import { RadioGroup } from '@tale-ui/react/radio-group';
import { RadioField } from '@tale-ui/react/radio-field';

export function Example() {
  return (
    <RadioGroup label="Subscription plan">
      <RadioField.Root value="free">
        <RadioField.Button>
          <RadioField.Indicator>
            <RadioField.Dot />
          </RadioField.Indicator>
          Free
        </RadioField.Button>
      </RadioField.Root>
      <RadioField.Root value="pro">
        <RadioField.Button>
          <RadioField.Indicator>
            <RadioField.Dot />
          </RadioField.Indicator>
          Pro
        </RadioField.Button>
        <RadioField.Description>
          Unlimited projects and priority support.
        </RadioField.Description>
      </RadioField.Root>
      <RadioField.Root value="enterprise">
        <RadioField.Button>
          <RadioField.Indicator>
            <RadioField.Dot />
          </RadioField.Indicator>
          Enterprise
        </RadioField.Button>
      </RadioField.Root>
    </RadioGroup>
  );
}
